_instructions: Paste this entire JSON into Nano Banana 2. No reference images needed. Generate 3-4 variations and pick the best

subject.demographics: American woman, 31, light olive skin, ambiguously Mediterranean/Latina-American heritage. Born and raised in the US — think Southern California or Texas

signature_details.primary: Prominent beauty mark — 4mm diameter, raised, dark brown — centered on right cheek, halfway between nose and ear. Impossible to miss in any frame. This is a MOLE, not a freckle — raised, dark, defined edges
signature_details.secondary: Gap between front two upper teeth — 2mm diastema. Visible when mouth opens even slightly. A distinctive feature, not something she'd fix
signature_details.tertiary: Asymmetric ear piercings: left ear has 3 piercings (lobe, mid-helix, upper helix). Right ear has ONLY lobe piercing. Always this exact configuration

subject.hair: Dark brown, thick, naturally curly (3A curl pattern) but currently air-dried and undefined — frizzy, no product, no definition. 'Gave up on styling today' texture. Shoulder-length, slightly shorter on right side from uneven growth. No color treatment, natural dark brown with a few lighter strands from sun
subject.skin_details: Light olive complexion with visible tiredness. Faint dark circles under eyes (olive-brown, not dramatic). Slight facial puffiness — water retention look, especially around jawline and under-eyes. This matches the 'bloating' angle. A few faint acne scars on both cheeks (shallow, textured, old). Pores visible on nose. The prominent beauty mark on right cheek is the dominant feature. Lips full, naturally mauve-brown, lower lip slightly chapped with dry skin at center
subject.apparel: Washed-out sage green oversized hoodie, hood down, drawstrings are different lengths (one shorter from being chewed/pulled). Sleeves pushed up to elbows revealing forearms. The green has faded unevenly — darker under arms, lighter across chest from sun/washing
accessories: Thin gold chain bracelet on right wrist — never takes it off, slightly tarnished, clasp has migrated to the side
Left ear: small gold hoop in lobe, tiny gold stud in mid-helix, tiny gold stud in upper helix
Right ear: small gold hoop in lobe ONLY (no other piercings)

expression.type: NEUTRAL for avatar lock. Natural resting face. Not reacting, not posing, not smiling. The face of someone who woke up puffy again and is just... tired of it
expression.micro_expression: The facial puffiness gives a slightly heavy quality to her features. Mouth relaxed, full lips slightly parted (1-2mm). Eyes open but not alert — low-energy neutral. Overall impression: 'another morning feeling swollen'
expression.gaze: Looking 2-3 degrees right of lens. Calm but slightly resigned gaze

camera.DOF: DEEP. Everything in sharp focus. NO blur. NO portrait mode
camera.framing: Head and shoulders ONLY. Centered. Clean and simple. NO hands in frame. NO phone visible. NO props. Just face, neck, and upper shoulders against a simple background

lighting.source: Soft natural window light from the left. Neutral-warm morning light. The puffiness in her face should be visible — the light should reveal it, not hide it

environment.setting: Simple neutral background. Plain wall or minimal interior. AVATAR LOCK IMAGE — no elaborate scene
environment.note: AVATAR LOCK IMAGE. No context. No story. Just the person
